$comment: Corevo back-office data model. Maps demo entities to REAL backend tables (from M6/M7 specs + migrations). 'Salong' = 'tenant' throughout. private.tenant_id() isolates tenant data (RLS); super-admin/Zivar bypasses it. build-once-never-delete: protected rows are suspended, never deleted (audit-guard).
principles: Identity vs PII split: stable customer identity (recognition, loyalty) is separate from contact-PII (phone/email), which is time-bound and shown only in the operational window around a booking, then masked/purged per GDPR retention.
No dead toggles: every settings toggle is truthfully wired or removed.
No forced required fields: forms are optional-rich; nothing blocks creation.
Live coupling (röd tråd): a change in one surface propagates everywhere it touches (e.g. cancel → slot freed on storefront).

fields.name: text
fields.status: enum: Aktiv | Pausad | Onboarding  (Pausad => public storefront blocked)
fields.theme: enum: Salvia | Leander | Zigge | Linnea | Edit (storefront template)
fields.variant: enum booking variant: Steg-för-steg(wizard) | Snabbboka(compact) | Drawer | Inline
fields.level: int 1-3 (customization level: 1-2 token-branding no-code; 3 = scoped CSS overrides via code only)

relations: has one Owner (Customer/auth user with role Ägare)

Location.note: Multi-location layer exists in schema; per-period staff allocation parked.

Customer.note: Stable identity row. Logged-in => linked to auth user. Guest => stable key (e.g. contact hash) so returning guests are recognized. Replaces old guest-in-note seam.

fields.showAs: enum: full | first | initial (customer-controlled display name)
fields.consent: bool (save contact for next time, else purge after visit)
fields.points: int (loyalty, bound to identity not PII)

profile.$comment: CUST_PROFILE — the 'frisören har koll'-data (röd tråd). Same prefs/memo seen by stylist (recognition) AND softly mirrored to the customer portal ('det här minns Elin om dig').

fields.memo: text (stylist's PRIVATE note, never shown to customer)

derived.custName(c): resolves display name from showAs: full=>fullName; first=>first word; initial=>'A. B.'

fields.name: text
fields.hasAccount: bool (own login + own quick view/calendar; if false, managed inside the salon page)
fields.services: via staff_services join (which services this stylist performs)

Staff.invite: magic-link = one-time invite (email -> confirm -> set password -> in, role assigned directly). Requires SERVICE_ROLE_KEY worker secret. NOT recurring login.

fields.name: text
fields.section: enum storefront section: Dam | Herr | Färg | Styling | Dold

Service.coupling: online + section control WHERE on storefront the service appears (M6 -> M2), no code/deploy.

fields.notes: Note[] (chat/notes against the row; customer messages land here, not as email thread)

rules: Auto-klar: passed time marks done if stylist didn't — booking NEVER disappears.
Never falsely 'klar + betald': a late/no-show under pay-at-booking is never auto-marked paid.
Cancel => status avbokad AND slot returns to storefront (M3 owns slot logic, shown in M6).

WorkingHours.model: EXPLICIT bookable start times per day (uneven intervals allowed, e.g. 12:30, 13:05, 14:00). Service length drives slot length — NOT a fixed raster. Each stylist has own cadence; the 'Alla' view = union of stylists' slots (M3).

TimeOff.coupling: absence auto-closes bookable slots on storefront for the period.

AuditLog.note: Black box. build-once-never-delete: deletion of protected rows (e.g. frisor3) is BLOCKED by design (audit-guard).

Billing.model: flöde 2 (manual). System produces UNDERLAG (completed bookings/month per tenant × rate, or flat_monthly). Zivar invoices manually outside the system. NO Stripe subscriptions / MRR automation.

items: Stripe Connect (pay-at-booking + weekly payout per tenant; flöde 1 customer pays salon)
Cloudflare/Domain (subdomain; custom domain parked: tenant_domains lacks status col)

roles.Super admin (Zivar): full platform control, bypasses tenant isolation
roles.Salongsägare: full control within own tenant only (the 'leksakslåda')
roles.Frisör: own day + own customers; PII time-bound
roles.Support (Corevo-team): read-only for troubleshooting; can trigger password reset
